summary: Completed testing of blockchain.com wallet clone. All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified - USDC card shows coin amounts correctly, Send modal shows USDC amounts without € prefix (fix verified), all modals working, notification system working, EUR currency used throughout.

verified_features.Test 2 - Admin User List: PASSED - Admin can see 17 users in table
verified_features.Test 4 - USDC Asset Card: PASSED - Shows '1,000.00 USDC' (no € prefix before amount)
verified_features.Test 7 - Swap Button: PASSED - Modal opens with USDC↔EUR direction toggle
verified_features.Test 8 - Send Button: PASSED - Modal shows 'Total Balance: 1,000.00 USDC' and 'Available to Send: 323.75 USDC' WITHOUT € symbol
verified_features.Test 9 - Deposit Button: PASSED - Modal opens with QR code and wallet address
verified_features.Test 10 - Withdraw Button: PASSED - Modal opens with EUR balance and IBAN form
verified_features.Test 11 - Notification Bell: PASSED - Shows unread count badge (1), dropdown opens with notifications
verified_features.Test 12 - EUR Currency Throughout: PASSED - All currency displays use € (EUR) not $ (USD)

latest_fix_verified.description: USDC amounts in Send modal no longer have € symbol prefix

mocked_apis.note: Financial data is admin-controlled/simulated. No real blockchain or banking integrations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. The latest fix (removing € symbols from USDC amounts in Send modal) is verified. USDC card shows '1,000.00 USDC' as primary with '≈ €920.00' as smaller grey text. All modals (Send, Swap, Deposit, Withdraw) work correctly. Notification system working with unread count badge. SSE endpoint accessible at /api/events/stream?token=xxx.
